title: Bacen Conformance
problem: Cumbuca's wedge is "no proprietary abstractions - code against the official Bacen and Open Finance specs." That is beautiful engineering taste but it has a cruel side effect: the official specs are vast, change frequently, and the failure modes (timeouts, idempotency, divergent participant behaviour at Itau vs. Bradesco vs. Nubank) are not in the spec at all.
direction: An open conformance test suite + idempotency/replay harness for Brazil's Pix and Open Finance APIs - written in Elixir to match Cumbuca's stack, vendor neutral on the surface, Cumbuca flavoured under the hood.
why: Built in Elixir/Phoenix because their hiring repo is Elixir. A candidate who shows up in Python would not have read the GitHub org. Encoding participant divergence as named profiles + monetary invariant shrinking.
